name: Concert Grunge Poster Carousel
aesthetic: Grungy gig-flyer zine — black distressed paper background with paint splatter and scratch texture, oversized bold sans headlines inside yellow paint-strip blocks, handwritten marker script for accent words, black-and-white portrait, Y2K smiley sticker, magenta + yellow rounded pills for quick details, handwritten-underlined detail rows at the bottom. Feels stapled to a pole outside a basement show.

fonts.display_bold: Archivo Black / Bebas Neue (block headlines inside yellow strips)
fonts.marker_script: Permanent Marker / Caveat Brush (handwritten accents, artist name)
fonts.handwritten: Caveat / Kalam (handwritten detail values — address, time, date)

slides.subject: Black distressed bg with splatter/scratch overlay and halftone-dot corners; yellow paint-strip blocks stacked top-left with 'NIGHT' + 'MUSIC' in Archivo Black; handwritten marker 'CONCERT' accent overlapping the yellow blocks; smiley Y2K sticker overlapping strip; B&W artist portrait centered with rainbow prism flare; handwritten marker artist name lower-right ('NOISE' style); two magenta + one yellow pill row (free parking / free drinks / address); bottom detail table with TIME / ADDRESS / DATE labels and handwritten values.

Same grunge bg. Large B&W dish photo with thin yellow highlight band; yellow strip label 'BEFORE THE SHOW' top-left; handwritten marker dish name in magenta or white; meta pills (cuisine, walk time, rating) below; short review note; handle bottom.

copy.label: 'BEFORE THE SHOW' fixed
copy.markerName: dish or restaurant name in marker script

slides.subject: Mirrored layout — B&W dish photo right, copy pane left with yellow strip label 'AFTER THE ENCORE', marker-script dish name, pills row, review note, handle.

Grunge bg; yellow strip label 'THE SET LIST' top; numbered list of 3-5 restaurants, each row with big yellow numeral, restaurant name (bold), handwritten tagline (cuisine · walk time · rating), dashed divider between rows; venue pin bottom with magenta dot.

Grunge bg; yellow strip block with 'FOUND ON' bold text; handwritten marker 'BiteMap!' next to or below the strip; transparent BiteMap logo; magenta + yellow pill row with tagline; app store badges; halftone dot corners; smiley sticker corner accent.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'FOUND ON' strip / BiteMap logo / tagline 'real places · real reviews' / app badges

inputs_required.artistName: string — headliner (shown in marker script on hero)

copy_rules: Yellow-strip headlines: ONE word each, ALL UPPERCASE, 5 letters or fewer ideal
Marker-script words: ONE word, handwritten feel — use as the emotional accent
Pills: 2-4 words max each, UPPERCASE or lowercase but consistent within a slide
Detail values use handwritten font — keep them short and scannable
Tone: gritty, specific, show-flyer honest — no hype adjectives
Restaurant name in @handle only — never in the big yellow-strip headline
asset_rules: Hero portrait gets desaturated to B&W — pick a high-contrast photo with a clear subject
Dish photos get partial desaturation — pick shots with strong composition, not just bright color
Minimum 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
Always use `bitemap_logo_transparent.png` — never a logo with baked-in background
use_when: Alt / rock / indie / hip-hop concerts where a gritty flyer reads more credibly than a polished poster
Late-night / club / warehouse / festival adjacent shows
Younger-skew audiences who respond to zine and streetwear visual language
When concert_poster feels too polished and the act / scene calls for rougher energy
